response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the reference lyrics for "Grateful Days" perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics from the reference JSON were fully utilized for the song portion, while the initial spoken banter and ad-libs from 03:34 to 04:05 were transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely with the vocal tracks, with zero subtitles during the static title screen from 00:00 to 03:34.

subtitles.original: Yeah! One, two, check, check, check, check, check.
subtitles.english: Yeah! One, two, check, check, check, check, check.

subtitles.original: Check, check. B-Show, Crown B-Show.
subtitles.english: Check, check. B-Show, Crown B-Show.

subtitles.original: Uh, huh.
subtitles.english: Uh, huh.

subtitles.original: Yeah, uh-huh, come on, come on, yo, uh...
subtitles.english: Yeah, uh-huh, come on, come on, yo, uh...

subtitles.original: 脳天気野郎 脳天気野郎
subtitles.english: Carefree guys, carefree guys!

subtitles.original: 脳天気野郎ですよ
subtitles.english: We're carefree guys!

subtitles.original: Zeebra, yeah. How's show?
subtitles.english: Zeebra, yeah. How's the show?

subtitles.original: Oh, Dragon Ash show!
subtitles.english: Oh, Dragon Ash show!

subtitles.original: Come on! Come on, yeah! Oh, 行くぞ！
subtitles.english: Come on! Come on, yeah! Oh, let's go!

subtitles.original: Turn up radio そう 今日も聞こえるよ
subtitles.english: Turn up the radio, yes, I can hear it today too

subtitles.original: 風に揺られ流れるStereo
subtitles.english: Stereo flowing, swayed by the wind

subtitles.original: 肩で刻む軽快なRhythm
subtitles.english: A cheerful rhythm tapped out on my shoulders

subtitles.original: 想いをのっけて届けるよRhyme
subtitles.english: Rhymes carrying my feelings to deliver to you

subtitles.original: よく晴れた空の真下 僕らは遥かな未来目指しました
subtitles.english: Right beneath the clear blue sky, we aimed for a distant future

subtitles.original: Master key 握り締め出発 雑踏の中 Kick down 一発
subtitles.english: Grip the master key tight and set off, one kick down in the middle of the crowd

subtitles.original: 今想う闘いの日々
subtitles.english: Now I think back to those days of struggle

subtitles.original: 感謝するごとに溢れ出す慈悲
subtitles.english: With every bit of gratitude, compassion overflows

subtitles.original: しのぎを削ったあの攻防戦
subtitles.english: That fierce battle where we clashed swords

subtitles.original: 今なお続くここは最前線
subtitles.english: Even now it continues, here on the front line

subtitles.original: 父から得た揺るぎない誇り
subtitles.english: The unwavering pride I got from my father

subtitles.original: 母がくれた大きないたわり
subtitles.english: The great kindness my mother gave me

subtitles.original: キミにもらう温かいぬくもり
subtitles.english: The warm comfort I receive from you

subtitles.original: 明日への糧に生き抜くために
subtitles.english: As nourishment for tomorrow, in order to survive

subtitles.original: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days
subtitles.english: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days

subtitles.original: I got song, I got love, I got grateful days
subtitles.english: I got song, I got love, I got grateful days

subtitles.original: I got it
subtitles.english: I got it

subtitles.original: You makes me happy, when sky's gray
subtitles.english: You make me happy, when the sky is gray
